member.name: T:AllStak.AllStakClient
member.summary: The AllStak .NET SDK client. Create once at application startup via , or inject it via DI with AddAllStak.

member.name: P:AllStak.AllStakClient.Instance
member.summary: Process-wide singleton. Throws if not initialized.

member.name: P:AllStak.AllStakClient.IsInitialized
member.summary: True if has been called.

member.name: P:AllStak.AllStakClient.Errors
member.summary: Error capture module.

member.name: P:AllStak.AllStakClient.Logs
member.summary: Structured logs module.

member.name: P:AllStak.AllStakClient.Http
member.summary: HTTP monitoring module (inbound + outbound).

member.name: P:AllStak.AllStakClient.Tracing
member.summary: Distributed tracing module.

member.name: P:AllStak.AllStakClient.Database
member.summary: Database query telemetry module.

member.name: P:AllStak.AllStakClient.Cron
member.summary: Cron / background job monitoring module.

member.name: M:AllStak.AllStakClient.Initialize(System.Action{AllStak.AllStakOptions},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Initialize the singleton. Subsequent calls return the existing instance.

member.name: M:AllStak.AllStakClient.InitializeFromOptions(AllStak.AllStakOptions,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Used by DI registration. Internal.

member.name: M:AllStak.AllStakClient.Reset
member.summary: Reset the singleton. Used by tests.

member.name: M:AllStak.AllStakClient.CaptureExceptionAsync(System.Exception,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Convenience: capture an exception on the singleton.

member.name: M:AllStak.AllStakClient.SetUser(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Set current user context on the singleton.

member.name: M:AllStak.AllStakClient.ClearUser
member.summary: Clear user context on the singleton.

member.name: M:AllStak.AllStakClient.FlushAllAsync
member.summary: Flush all buffered telemetry across modules.

member.name: M:AllStak.AllStakClient.Shutdown
member.summary: Best-effort shutdown — flushes all buffers and disposes resources.

member.name: T:AllStak.AllStakOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for the AllStak SDK.

member.name: P:AllStak.AllStakOptions.ApiKey
member.summary: API key sent as X-AllStak-Key. Required.

member.name: P:AllStak.AllStakOptions.Host
member.summary: Base URL of the AllStak backend (without trailing slash). Default: https://api.allstak.sa. Override for self-hosted or local-dev use.

member.name: P:AllStak.AllStakOptions.Environment
member.summary: Deployment environment, e.g. "production", "staging".

member.name: P:AllStak.AllStakOptions.Release
member.summary: App version or release tag, e.g. "taskflow@1.4.2".

member.name: P:AllStak.AllStakOptions.ServiceName
member.summary: Logical service name attached to spans and logs.

member.name: P:AllStak.AllStakOptions.FlushIntervalMs
member.summary: Background flush interval in milliseconds. Default 2000 ms.

member.name: P:AllStak.AllStakOptions.BufferSize
member.summary: Maximum number of items held per feature buffer. Default 500.

member.name: P:AllStak.AllStakOptions.Debug
member.summary: Enable verbose SDK debug logging to ILogger. Default false.

member.name: P:AllStak.AllStakOptions.ConnectTimeoutMs
member.summary: Connect timeout (ms) for transport calls. Default 3000 ms.

member.name: P:AllStak.AllStakOptions.ReadTimeoutMs
member.summary: Read timeout (ms) for transport calls. Default 3000 ms.

member.name: P:AllStak.AllStakOptions.MaxRetries
member.summary: Maximum transport attempts per event. Default 5.

member.name: P:AllStak.AllStakOptions.CaptureUnhandledExceptions
member.summary: If true, automatically capture unhandled exceptions from ASP.NET Core routes.

member.name: P:AllStak.AllStakOptions.CaptureHttpRequests
member.summary: If true, automatically capture inbound HTTP request telemetry via the middleware.

member.name: P:AllStak.AllStakOptions.CaptureUserContext
member.summary: If true, attach user context from HttpContext.User to captured events.

member.name: T:AllStak.Integrations.AspNetCore.AllStakMiddleware
member.summary: ASP.NET Core middleware that: 1. Starts a fresh trace per request (or adopts traceparent / X-AllStak-Trace-Id if present) 2. Captures inbound HTTP request telemetry (method, path, host, status, duration, sizes) 3. Auto-captures unhandled exceptions with full request context, user, stack, and trace link 4. Rethrows so the framework's own exception handler runs.

member.name: M:AllStak.Integrations.AspNetCore.AllStakServiceCollectionExtensions.AddAllStak(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{AllStak.AllStakOptions})
member.summary: Register the AllStak SDK in DI. The client is initialized as a singleton. Call app.UseAllStak() to register the request middleware.

member.name: M:AllStak.Integrations.AspNetCore.AllStakApplicationBuilderExtensions.UseAllStak(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Register the AllStak request middleware. Should be registered BEFORE UseRouting / UseEndpoints and AFTER UseExceptionHandler (so it can observe the final status code).

member.name: T:AllStak.Integrations.EntityFrameworkCore.AllStakDbCommandInterceptor
T:AllStak.Integrations.HttpClient.AllStakHttpHandler
T:AllStak.Integrations.Logging.AllStakLoggerProvider
member.summary:
Microsoft.Extensions.Logging provider that ships every ILogger call at Information or above to AllStak's logs ingest. Plug it into the host's logging pipeline to get auto-capture without sprinkling AllStakClient.Instance.Log.Info(...) through your code.
Usage (Program.cs):
builder.Logging.AddProvider(new AllStakLoggerProvider());
Or via the helper extension builder.Logging.AddAllStak();.

member.name: M:AllStak.Integrations.Logging.AllStakLoggerExtensions.AddAllStak(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggingBuilder,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel)
member.summary: Convenience: builder.Logging.AddAllStak();

member.name: T:AllStak.Models.DbQueryPayload
member.summary: DB query record for POST /ingest/v1/db.

member.name: T:AllStak.Models.ErrorPayload
member.summary: Payload for POST /ingest/v1/errors.

member.name: T:AllStak.Models.Breadcrumb
member.summary: Breadcrumb attached to the next captured error.

member.name: T:AllStak.Models.HeartbeatPayload
member.summary: Payload for POST /ingest/v1/heartbeat.

member.name: T:AllStak.Models.HttpRequestItem
member.summary: Single HTTP request/response record for POST /ingest/v1/http-requests.

member.name: T:AllStak.Models.HttpRequestBatch
member.summary: Batch wrapper for HTTP request ingestion (max 100 items).

member.name: T:AllStak.Models.LogPayload
member.summary: Payload for POST /ingest/v1/logs.

member.name: T:AllStak.Models.SpanPayload
member.summary: Single span for POST /ingest/v1/spans.

member.name: T:AllStak.Models.UserContext
member.summary: Optional user context attached to captured events.

member.name: T:AllStak.Models.RequestContext
member.summary: Optional HTTP request context attached to error events.

member.name: T:AllStak.Modules.CronModule
member.summary: Cron / background-job monitoring. Sends a heartbeat per job execution. Auto-creates the monitor on first ping (backend behavior).

member.name: M:AllStak.Modules.CronModule.Job(System.String)
M:AllStak.Modules.CronModule.PingAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Int64,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send a single heartbeat ping directly.

member.name: T:AllStak.Modules.JobHandle
member.summary: Dispose to send success/failure heartbeat.

member.name: M:AllStak.Modules.JobHandle.MarkFailed(System.String)
member.summary: Mark the job as failed with a message. Pending heartbeat will be "failed".

member.name: T:AllStak.Modules.DatabaseModule
member.summary: Database query telemetry, buffered and batched (100/batch).

member.name: T:AllStak.Modules.ErrorModule
member.summary: Captures exceptions and ships them to AllStak.

member.name: M:AllStak.Modules.ErrorModule.SetUser(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Set a default user context attached to all subsequent error events.

member.name: M:AllStak.Modules.ErrorModule.ClearUser
member.summary: Clear the current user context.

member.name: M:AllStak.Modules.ErrorModule.AddBreadcrumb(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Add a breadcrumb. Oldest are dropped beyond 50.

member.name: M:AllStak.Modules.ErrorModule.CaptureExceptionAsync(System.Exception,System.String,AllStak.Models.UserContext,AllStak.Models.RequestContext,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Capture a .NET exception and send it to AllStak. Never throws.
Capture an error by class + message without a .NET exception object.

member.name: T:AllStak.Modules.HttpMonitorModule
member.summary: Inbound and outbound HTTP request telemetry. Batches up to 100 per POST.

member.name: T:AllStak.Modules.LogModule
member.summary: Buffered log ingestion. Each log is sent as its own POST.

member.name: M:AllStak.Modules.LogModule.Log(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Buffer a log for async delivery.

member.name: T:AllStak.Modules.TracingModule
member.summary: Distributed tracing spans, buffered and batched.

member.name: M:AllStak.Modules.TracingModule.StartSpan(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Begin a span. Dispose the returned Span to finish it.

member.name: T:AllStak.Modules.Span
member.summary: A single span. Dispose to finish.

member.name: T:AllStak.Transport.FlushBuffer`1
member.summary: Bounded ring buffer with a background timer thread that periodically drains the buffer and calls the supplied flush delegate.

member.name: T:AllStak.Transport.HttpTransport
member.summary: HTTP transport with retry/backoff + 401-disable.
